description_long: This lamp features a circular wooden shade with engraved, illuminated text wrapping around its exterior, giving it a modern and personalized appearance. The shade is supported by a single, curved wooden arm that connects to a rounded, flat base, providing stability and a sculptural aesthetic. The text on the shade appears to be backlit, suggesting integrated LED lighting within the ring. The wood grain is visible throughout, lending a natural and warm feel to the design. The lamp's structure is minimalistic, with no visible switches or external wiring, emphasizing its clean lines. The overall form and materials suggest it is intended as a decorative and functional lighting piece for urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A modern wooden lamp with a circular, illuminated text shade supported by a curved wooden arm and a rounded base, featuring integrated LED lighting and a natural wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular wooden shade with engraved, glowing text and the curved support arm attached to the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuation of the illuminated text and the curvature of the supporting arm.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backlit text 'İNŞAAT' and the smooth, rounded base.
description_view_3: Angled rear view displaying the engraved logo, the back of the shade, and the attachment of the arm to the base.
